traits.name: Swarm
traits.desc: Always encountered in groups of 4+. For every three Creeps attacking the same target simultaneously, that target has Setback on Defense Rating checks.

traits.name: Ankle Biter
traits.desc: On hit, target makes Finesse check DC 11 or is Slowed until end of next turn.

traits.name: Expendable
traits.desc: Creeps don't trigger the Escalation rule and don't count against the Threat budget.

traits.name: Scatter
traits.desc: When more than half the Creeps in an encounter are destroyed, survivors flee.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: If two or more Beowolves attack the same target in the same round, each gains Edge on their attack roll.

traits.name: Flinch Test
traits.desc: On the first round Beowolves don't attack. A character who makes a Resolve check DC 11 forces the pack to commit; visible hesitation (or a failed Composure check) grants Beowolves Edge on their first attack.

traits.name: Ambush Predator
traits.desc: Attacking an unaware target automatically grants Edge and deals maximum damage on hit.

traits.name: Pounce
traits.desc: Action. Charges from Mid to Close as part of the attack. On hit, target makes Brawn check DC 13 or is knocked prone and Grappled; the Sabyr gains Edge on subsequent attacks until the Grapple is broken.

traits.name: Sprint
traits.desc: Bonus Action. Move two range bands instead of one.

traits.name: Pack Hunt
traits.desc: When two or more Sabyrs are present, a target attacked by both cannot use their Reaction until the start of their next turn.

traits.name: Crushing Blow
traits.desc: On a critical hit, target is knocked back one range band and must make a Grit check DC 14 or be knocked prone.

traits.name: Thick Hide
traits.desc: Ranged attacks deal half damage unless the attacker is Trained in Perception and makes a called shot targeting a weak point.

traits.name: Airborne
traits.desc: Operates at Long or Extreme range by default. Melee cannot reach it without Semblance, grappling, or environmental factors.

traits.name: Feather Barrage
traits.desc: Action. Razor feathers hit all characters at Mid range — each makes a Finesse check DC 14 or takes damage.

traits.name: Screech
traits.desc: Once per encounter. All characters make a Resolve check DC 11 or gain Setback on all rolls until end of next turn.

traits.name: Howl
traits.desc: Bonus Action. All Beowolves within Long range gain Edge on attack rolls until the start of the Alpha's next turn.

traits.name: Pack Tactics & Flinch Test
traits.desc: Has all mechanics of the standard Beowolf.

traits.name: Two Heads, Two Actions
traits.desc: Gets two Actions per turn, one per head. Both cannot target the same character in the same turn.

traits.name: White Head — Aggressor (Ferocity d10)
traits.desc: Constrict: on hit, target makes Brawn check DC 14 or is Grappled.

traits.name: Black Head — Cunning (Ferocity d8)
traits.desc: Venom Strike: on hit, target makes Grit check DC 11 or is Poisoned — Setback on Brawn and Finesse checks for 3 rounds.

traits.name: Drain
traits.desc: At the start of every round, every character makes a Resolve check DC 13: Partial — lose Bonus Action; Failure — lose Bonus Action AND Movement.

traits.name: Cumulative Despair
traits.desc: Each consecutive failed Drain check raises the DC by 1. Three consecutive failures: Despairing. An ally must spend a full Action and succeed on Resolve DC 14 to snap them out.

traits.name: Ghostly Movement
traits.desc: Silent. Only sight or Aura Sense detects them before Drain begins.

traits.name: Pack Moan
traits.desc: Each additional Apathy increases the Drain DC by 2.

traits.name: Ancient Armor
traits.desc: Standard attacks deal minimum damage. Called shots at plate gaps (joints, face) deal full damage. Spotting weak points: Wit check DC 13 or Training in Perception.

traits.name: Tremor Step
traits.desc: Whenever it moves range bands, every character at Close range makes a Finesse check DC 12 or is knocked prone.

traits.name: Tusk Gore
traits.desc: Action. On hit, target makes Grit check DC 16 or is launched two range bands, landing prone and taking an extra d8 impact damage.

traits.name: Stomp
traits.desc: Action. All characters at Close range make Finesse check DC 14 or take full damage and are knocked prone; success still takes half.

traits.name: Memory of Failure
traits.desc: Recognizes and prioritizes any Huntsman who previously failed to defeat this specific Goliath.

traits.name: Immovable
traits.desc: Cannot be forcibly moved. Only Gravity Dust can pin it for one round.

traits.name: Earthshaker
traits.desc: Action. Ground slam — all characters at Close range make a Finesse check DC 14 or are knocked prone.

traits.name: Crushing Blow & Thick Hide
traits.desc: Has all mechanics of the standard Ursa.

traits.name: Divebomb
traits.desc: Moving from Extreme to Close in one turn deals automatic damage to every character at Close range on arrival — no attack roll.

traits.name: Airborne, Feather Barrage, Screech
traits.desc: Has all mechanics of the standard Nevermore.

traits.name: Impenetrable Shell
traits.desc: Standard attacks always deal minimum damage. Only called shots at weak points (underbelly, eyes, stinger joint) deal full damage.

traits.name: Stinger
traits.desc: Action. Ranged attack, Mid range. On hit, Grit check DC 17 or Poisoned — 1d8 damage at the start of each turn for 3 rounds.

traits.name: Claw Sweep
traits.desc: Action. Melee attack against all characters at Close range simultaneously.

traits.name: Death Throes
traits.desc: At 0 HP, takes one final frenzied Claw Sweep at Edge before dissolving.

traits.name: Adaptive Fighter
traits.desc: After round one, gains Edge on all attacks against whoever dealt the most damage, for the rest of the encounter.

traits.name: Knuckle Rush
traits.desc: Action. Charges Mid to Close as part of the attack. On hit, Brawn check DC 14 or knocked back one band and prone.

traits.name: Chest Pound
traits.desc: Bonus Action, once per encounter. All characters at Close and Mid make Resolve DC 14 or have Setback on their next attack.

traits.name: Hurl Debris
traits.desc: Action. Ranged, Long range. On hit, Finesse DC 14 or Staggered. Needs terrain to throw.

traits.name: Pack Loyalty
traits.desc: If Beowolves are present, all of them always have Pack Tactics active.

traits.name: Titan Presence
traits.desc: At combat start every character makes Resolve DC 17. Failure: Setback on all rolls for the first two rounds.

traits.name: Flight
traits.desc: Operates at Extreme range by default; may land to Close/Mid.

traits.name: Grimm Breath
traits.desc: Action, recharge 5+ on d10. Targets all characters in one range band — massive damage and Burning.

traits.name: Spawn Point
traits.desc: While alive: at the start of each round roll a d6 — that many Threat 1 Grimm arrive from the nearest edge.

traits.name: Ancient Shell
traits.desc: Armor 10 cannot be bypassed by called shots alone; reducing it needs environment, teamwork, or exceptional Semblance use.

traits.name: The Reaper's Cry
traits.desc: Before initiative, every character makes Resolve DC 20. Partial: Setback on Resolve checks for the encounter. Failure: Terrified.

traits.name: Relentless Pursuit
traits.desc: Cannot be outrun — it closes any range-band increase at the end of the round at no cost. Escape needs Semblance, obstacles, or tactics.

traits.name: Mane Whip
traits.desc: Action. Hits all characters at Close AND Mid. Each makes Finesse DC 17 or takes full damage and is knocked prone.

traits.name: Mounted Charge
traits.desc: Action, cannot be Intercepted. On hit: double damage die and thrown two bands, landing prone. On crit: target triggers their Final Flare if HP remains.

traits.name: Tenacity
traits.desc: Frozen, Shocked, Staggered, and Knockback have no effect. Only Gravity Dust and Burning work — and it does not stop moving.

traits.name: Death Scream
traits.desc: At 0 HP, releases one final Reaper's Cry at full effect (Resolve DC 20).
